vault.passwordRequired: Master password is required to decrypt your vault.

createPassword.title: Set Master Password
createPassword.desc: Please set a master password to protect your vault.

confirmSetNewPassword.title: Make sure you remember your master password!
confirmSetNewPassword.desc: This master password is unchangeable (for now)! If you accidentally forget the password, you lose everything. This password is hashed and stored in your user profile, and it is not decryptable. It will be used to encrypt and decrypt the data you store in your vault.

messages.success: OTP sent! Please check your email.
messages.cooldown: Request too frequent, please try again later

required.title: OTP Required to Unlock
required.desc: For added security, an OTP is required to unlock this module. Please click the button below to request an OTP.
